meaning: n.加利福尼亚州人adj.加州的
examples: Joshua Halpern is a native Northern Californian.
The owl is sacred for many Californian Indian people.
Mr. Chou can sound more like a Californian management guru than an Asian corporate patriarch.
Long before the Wall Street crisis, many Californian cities had their own mini meltdowns.
The innovative mobile parking solution, ParkNow, will debut in the Californian city in September.
